summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and provides no shared canonical, so each open PR is classified independently with no close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation planned.

actions.reason: Independent ready-for-maintainer PR; no canonical or duplicate relationship is established in this inventory shard.
Independent contributor PR awaiting normal maintainer/author flow; no close action is supported.
Draft maintainer-owned feature work should remain independent for maintainer review, not closed or merged by this shard.
Independent feature PR; no duplicate/superseded evidence and merge is blocked by job policy and missing merge preflight.
Draft maintainer-owned diagnostic work is independent and should stay in its own review path.
Independent PR needing proof/check follow-up; low-signal closeout is not enabled and no duplicate evidence exists.
Independent feature PR; failing check blocks any merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout, but not conservative classification.
Independent compatibility PR; proof failure blocks merge-style action, and no duplicate/superseded evidence is present.
Independent ready-for-maintainer PR; should remain in its own validation/review path.
Independent broad feature/config PR needing proof follow-up; no safe close or merge action is available.
Independent bugfix PR; failing check blocks merge/fixed-by-candidate action, and linked issue closeout is out of scope without hydrated issue state.
Independent bugfix PR; no merge or linked issue closeout can be planned in this inventory shard.
Independent PR needing proof follow-up; no security quarantine, close, merge, or fix action is warranted from the provided artifact.
Potential low-signal or under-proven PR, but closeout is disabled; keep independent for maintainer/author follow-up.
Independent tooling PR; no closure or merge recommendation is authorized by this plan-mode inventory shard.
Independent draft bugfix/hardening PR needing proof follow-up; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed.
